directories.baseline: Existing-project current-state baselines, imported documents, inferred context, and formal approval records.
directories.assessments: Immutable assessment proposals, mutable workflow state, approvals, and idempotent application journals.
directories.workflows: Versioned workflow definitions and overlays plus durable start journals, same-filesystem staging, immutable instance headers, append-only event streams, checkpoints binding the ordered full audit-trace chain, and hash-bound pending transitions recoverable only by the same idempotent retry.
directories.budgets: Execution budgets, versioned amendments, and usage snapshots under the configured budget storage root.
directories.authorizations: Explicit, action-scoped delegated automation grants with immutable approval evidence.
directories.authorization-uses: Validity-at-use authorization snapshots under the configured authority usage-receipt root.
directories.receipts: Host approvals, authorization uses, artifact generation, verification, and execution-usage receipts.
directories.output-contracts: Approved output templates, artifact links, and user-approved structural decisions.
directories.requirements: User, product, business, and non-functional requirements.
directories.work-items: Project-local epics and tasks used for agreed work breakdown.
directories.dependencies: Approved story/task dependency graph and proposals.
directories.stories: Story-scoped workspaces, claims, plans, logs, and evidence.
directories.orchestration: Project-level orchestration snapshots for parent chats coordinating multiple story lanes.
directories.locks: Phase or shared-artifact locks that prevent accidental parallel mutation.
directories.handoffs: Story handoff records between agents, phases, or Codex chats.
directories.risks: Delivery, technical, operational, and product risks.
directories.tests: Test plans, test reports, coverage notes, and evidence.
directories.releases: Release manifests, release-gate receipts, rollout evidence, observability, and feedback loops.
directories.manifests: Shared compact KB manifests generated from canonical source files.
directories.archive: Logical legacy-exclusion records plus distinct plan-first filesystem archive plans for old closed reports and trace compactions.
directories.cache: Local regenerable cache for fast KB lookup, story-requirement graphs, fingerprints, summaries, and output resolution results.
directories.reports: Generated gate, audit, and quality reports.

parallel_work_policy.merge_rule: Review code changes and .sdlc artifacts together.
